title: Mildly Spicy Spanish Chickpea Fideua
description: A spicy, creamy, and comforting Spanish dish featuring chickpea flour, kombu-cold-extract, and FODMAP-friendly ingredients, served in a traditional fideua form.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the garlic-infused oil and cook for an additional minute.
In a large bowl, whisk together the chickpea flour, sea salt, and black pepper.
Gradually add the vegetable broth to the bowl, whisking continuously.
Add the kombu-cold-extract and whisk until well combined.
Pour the mixture into the skillet and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and stir in the coconut cream and lemon juice.
